observations.value: POST /cart/apply with coupon=SAVE10&subtotal=100 returns a JSON response where the 'active' list contains duplicate entries of the same coupon (e.g., ["SAVE10","SAVE10","SAVE10","SAVE10","SAVE10"]) instead of listing it once. Each subsequent call adds another duplicate: first call returns 5 copies, second call returns 6 copies, third call returns 7 copies, etc. The coupon is being appended to the active list on every application rather than being recorded once.

POST /orders with header Idempotency-Key: test-key-abc returns a new order_id (A1013, then A1014) and 'idempotent: false' on every call with the same key, instead of returning the same order_id and 'idempotent: true' for repeat requests with the same Idempotency-Key. The idempotency-key deduplication is not functioning.

Each subsequent call adds another duplicate: first call returns 5 copies, second call returns 6 copies, third call returns 7 copies, etc. The coupon is being appended to the active list on every application rather than being recorded once.

POST /orders with header Idempotency-Key: test-key-abc returns a new order_id (A1013, then A1014) and 'idempotent: false' on every call with the same key, instead of returning the same order_id and 'idempotent: true' for repeat requests with the same Idempotency-Key. The idempotency-key deduplication is not functioning.
